description:
In Mission Amazonia a strategic deckbuilding board game you are part of a Brazilian team of rainforest protectors. From your headquarters (e.g. Pôrto Velho) you go on different missions north and south of the Amazon to curb the illegal exploitation of the rainforest. The poaching of exotic animal species, the prohibited logging of tropical timber or the poisoning of rivers through illegal gold mining are your daily challenges. Now the race against time begins, and the question is whether you can collaborate effectively as a team and use your resources (such as vehicles, night vision devices, satellite images, GPS, etc.) and skills wisely to slow down or even stop the extinction of species and the ongoing deforestation.


     Explore the Amazon rainforest on realistic maps (covering the states of Rondônia, Pará and Amazonas) in 10 chapters where you can experience the deforestation in 5-year steps (starting from the late 1980s).



     Use your equipment (vehicles, satellite images etc.) wisely and purchase new tools (drone, night vision device, GPS, etc.) at the right time.



     The maps and new rules for every chapter are summarized in the 24-page chapter book. That allows players to jump in or out with ease.



     Get more experience as a team over a 10+ hour campaign.

Be the first player to collect five gems of different colours from the following themes:

Nature and the universe (blue)
Daily life (yellow)
Words (orange)
World of fantasy (red)
Living creatures (green)

Read a card from the deck for all players (for example write down as many types of footwear as possible). The person with the most valid responses (and a minimum of 3) wins the gem.

If the card requires a spoken response, the card reader choose a specific player to list, for example, professions starting with the letter P. At least two valid answers are required for that player to win a gem.

If the card from the deck is a 'surprise', a player can win a bonus token. For example, the person wearing the most red wins a bonus token. Once a player accumulates 2 bonus tokens, they can exchange it for a gem in the colour of their choice.

Ścieżki Pamięci ("Paths of Memory") is an educational board game, prepared mainly for primary and secondary school students. The creators' intention is to combine entertainment and fun with providing knowledge about national memorial sites related to the history of Bydgoszcz.

The game has three basic variants:

     classic memo;
     combining memo with naming the objects presented in the pictures
     combining memo with placing on the map the objects presented in the pictures 


"Ścieżki Pamięci" to edukacyjna gra planszowa, przygotowana głównie z myślą o uczniach szkół podstawowych i ponadpodstawowych. Założeniem twórców jest połączenie rozrywki i zabawy z przekazywaniem wiedzy na temat miejsc pamięci narodowej związanych z historią Bydgoszczy.

The aim of the game is to teach players the regulations for amateur fishing in Poland.

The game is played in a series of round where player have to answer questions about minimum catch sizes and protection periods of various fishes found in Poland. The first person to get to certain number of points wins.

—user summary

Celem gry jest zapoznanie graczy – przez zabawę – z Regulaminem Amatorskiego Połowu Ryb. Gra ma również za zadanie uświadomić, jak ważne jest posiadanie karty wędkarskiej. 
Wędkarz doskonały to pomoc dla instruktorów i inspektorów szkolenia wędkarskiej młodzieży w przygotowaniu jej do zdania egzaminu na kartę wędkarską.

—description from the publisher

You are the owner of a thrift boutique! Visit thrift stores and yard sales to collect awesome outfits and great bargains for your shop. During each shopping round, You can decide to feature an outfit on your mannequin, issue a promotion, travel to the local yard sale, or visit the local thrift shop.  You may want to start with last week's discounted left overs on the clearance rack, or perhaps you want to be the first player to scope out what's new at the yard sale?  You'll have to consider profits and probabilities.  When the last player returns to her shop, the selling round immediately begins.

Take turns rolling the dice to see what sells.  Factor in any promotions you may have in place that might allow you to adjust the dice totals up or down to increase the number of items you are able to sell.  Once a 7 is rolled, the day is over, and it's time to go shopping again.

To win, be the shop that makes the biggest profit!

—description from the designer

A student is found murdered at a graduation party. Players must examine all the evidence and look for clues in newspapers, witness statements, autopsy reports, phone records, maps, photos, surveillance videos, websites and more. Players must find suspicious details in the evidence and reveal the killer.
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
The kingdom is in ruins. Invaders from the west have  decimated the island and the rulers in it. In the midst of the kingdom's turmoil, two powerful Daimyos rise to power. Working together, they expel the invaders and free the country. But all is not well. During the war, the Daimyos never fully trusted each other, and now that the common enemy is gone, that fact is about to be made even more clear. Both desire to be ruler, but only one can be crowned. As one of these Daimyos, you will have to lead your army to sabotage your opponent's castle. You will have to balance building your army, advancing your hidden ninjas, and halting the enemy advance. The Daimyo who can successfully advance all his ninjas to his opponent's castle before his opponent can do the same, will be crowned ruler over Japan! (Photos have been generated by Canva's AI art generator, Magic Media.)

https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/welltodowalrus/the-shadow-of-the-nokizaru?ref=241xjs

THREE IN ONE GAME - Enjoy a trio of Tic-Tac-Toe themed games in one box, perfect for groups of 1-4 players. Ideal for family game nights or friend gatherings, it offers quick-to-start fun for players of all ages.

INFINITE TIC-TAC-TOE - Experience the classic game like never before with Infinite Tic-Tac-Toe mode. Choose between head-to-head mode or playing against an adaptive AI that adjusts its difficulty based on the player's skill level. Say goodbye to endless draws and embrace a fresh and engaging challenge every time.

MEMORY FLASH - Test and enhance your memory with our Memory Flash game. Keep your focus sharp as you identify and recall the light sequences. Try to clear all 9 progressive difficulties in one go to beat the game!

COVER-UP TIC-TAC-TOE - Each piece comes in three sizes, and on each turn, you can place or move a piece. Larger pieces can cover smaller ones—connect three of your color to win! This strategy board game is perfect for exercising critical thinking and reasoning skills.

—description from the publisher
family: Versions & Editions: Electronic Versions of Non-Electronic Games

description: 17 members of a cult are found dead and cult leader is missing. Players must examine all the evidence and look for clues in newspapers, witness statements, autopsy reports, phone records, maps, photos, surveillance videos, websites and more. Players must find suspicious details in the evidence and reveal the killer.

Camila Ferrer is in a fierce stuggle to keep Pastisseria Sant Jordi, the family bakery, from being sold. Her grandmother iaia Rosa has hidden the secret to the Catalan bakery's success in an online vault. Help Camila beat her cousin Arturo to the secret, retain the famous pastisseria and make her iaia proud.

Solve all nine puzzle and break into the online vault before it's too late.

Worst Idea Wins is a card-based party game where players create the wildest, most un-boring and inappropriate Ads for the most insane products never created.

Players take turns acting as the CEO and sharing a PRODUCT card for the remaining players to construct their most over the top Ad to impress her/him with. The remaining players, aka “The Creatives” create their best/worst ad by choosing their best combination of SETTING, CHARACTER, ACTION, TWIST and end ANNOUNCER cards to wrap up their commercial.

Whichever player presents the winning combination, as judged by the CEO, wins that PRODUCT card and earns the dollar amount shown on the card. The first player to reach $1M wins.

—description from the designer

Throw yourself into New York's celebrity chef scene - a lavish world of fine dining extravagance and drama.

Abigail Remes, one of New York's up-and-coming chefs, has stumbled across what looks like one of her employees trying to swindle her out of thousands of dollars. Her bank manager has called, she seems to be in all sorts of trouble and needs your help to sort out the mess.

Solve all nine puzzles and break into the online vault to work out exactly what is going on!

In 7th century, the Tubo king Songtsen Gampo gave orders to build a great palace on Red Mountain, name it “Potala”, means “the holy place”, in order to marry a noble chinese princess Wencheng from Tang Dynasty. According to legend, the princess Wencheng was a devout follower of Buddhism. When she married Songtsen Gampo, she brought with her as part of her dowry a precious statue of the Buddha that awaken a demon living in the Red Mountain during the construction of the Potala Palace, he tried to disrupt the work every night by destroying what had been built during the day. To prevent this, King Songtsen Gampo consulted an oracle, which advised that the demon be appeased with the offering of the body of a man or woman. Princess Wencheng, with great courage, volunteered to be sacrificed.

After two hundred years, with the perdition of Tubo Dynasty, the Potala Palace were damaged during wars in 9th century, there were only ruins left, making the demon awaken again. 
Until in 17th century when the 5th Dalai Lama came to power, he commanded his Rinpoches (the players) with they monk-workers, to rebuilding the palace immediately and vanish the demon once for all, making the Potala Palace a new home and a spiritual tower for the next generations of the Dalai Lamas.

Potala Palace is a euro-game with deck building and worker/dice placement mechanics, where players take on the roles of Rinpoches who must assist in the reconstruction of the palace using their dice (workers) to acquire new resources and cards to improve their decks, allowing them to build new facilities such as halls, statues, reliquaries, thangkas (a type of Tibetan tapestry), thus accumulating "merit points" (victory points) and achieving enlightenment by completing the "Great Mandala" at the end of the game. The game features a day and night mechanics where players' deck cards can be flipped upside down, completely changing their effects, further expanding the strategic possibilities of the game, but beware of the demon's jealousy, as he may come during the nighttime to destroy something the players have built.

—description from the designer

This is a story about girls fighting to survive in a post-apocalyptic world. Hordes of zombies, abnormal weather, and natural disasters attack the barely surviving humans. One day, they discover a clue that reveals the mastermind who led their world into chaos. Can they defeat the final boss and restore their peaceful world?

Players send out their characters to explore, gather food, and recruit allies. They must overcome natural disasters and outside attacks as they race to defeat the mastermind faster than anyone else. A player wins by defeating the mastermind or being the last one left alive.

An unprecedented opportunity is approaching for a kingdom that has flourished with martial arts and magic. The future of this world depends on the "God Chance," an ancient ritual to summon the legendary saviors. To perform this ritual, you must collect precious "God Summoning Stones." Your mission is to find the God Summoning Stones and summon the gods as quickly as possible.

(Actually, that's the imaginary intro for "Gacha ~God Chance~," a fictional social-networking game.)

This board game recreates the excitement of drawing a large number of gachas through purchases and in-game events. There's even the dreaded fear of duplicates! Work your real-life job to save money, but you also need to progress through the game's quest to receive draw bonuses. You can even defeat the raid boss for a sudden upset.

Play hard, get lucky, and collect those Ultra Rare characters!

—description from the publisher (adapted and transated)
publishers: Yanekan's Board Game Studio (ヤネカンのボードゲーム工房)

description:
The tunnels of the Wintermaw are said to conceal ancient treasures, lost secrets, and even mortal souls trapped within eternal ice. However, those foolhardy enough to claim such prizes will soon encounter the hideous burrowing abominations that slew these poor souls in the first place...

The ultimate competitive miniatures game dives deeper into the Deathgorge with the Warhammer Underworlds: Wintermaw boxed set. This box has everything you need to start playing, including two complete warbands, four decks of cards, dice, tokens, boards, and more.

Warhammer Underworlds is a deck-based strategy game of skirmish battles set in Warhammer Age of Sigmar’s Mortal Realms. It’s full of action, clever combinations and tricks, and fast-paced gameplay. You’ll be able to get started right away with the four complete 32-card Rivals decks included in the box – one for Bretherin of the Bolt, one for The Skinnerkin, and two universal Rivals decks for any warband. If you wish, you can even tailor your own deck using universal cards from other Warhammer Underworlds expansions for near-endless strategic depth.

This set contains:


     A complete and concise rulebook for Warhammer Underworlds – reformatted to make getting started even easier. Wintermaw emphasises Rivals decks, offering new ways to mix up your games and keep things fresh and balanced. The riveting background material delves deeper into the icy Deathgorge, and the terrifying rimewyrm nests of the Wintermaw.



     The complete Brethren of the Bolt warband. Each acolyte of this religious order from the Cities of Sigmar has been struck by lightning, and continues to seek fresh storms to prove their devotion to Sigmar. Quickly assemble your warband with five push-fit models, cast in light grey to stand out even when unpainted, complete with fighter cards and a full Rivals deck



     The complete Skinnerkin warband. Delusional ghouls with mangy hair, bone-studded skin, and vicious teeth, the Skinnerkin believe themselves to be royal cooks and fine gourmets. The ancient frozen corpses in the Wintermaw present a bounty of exotic meats, fit for the Summerking's banquet hall. With five push-fit models, cast in a sickly green colour, plus fighter cards and a pre-made Rivals deck, you’ll be ready to battle immediately.



     Two additional universal Rivals decks, usable by any warband – unleash the true horrors of the Wintermaw with Rimewyrm's Bite, and deal further abominations upon your foes with Hungering Parasite.



     A pair of double-sided game boards to represent the icy pitfalls and frozen graveyards deep within the Wintermaw.



     Warhammer Underworlds tokens, including objectives, wound markers, glory points, and many, many more


​

     11 dice: five Attack dice, three Defence dice, and three Magic dice, enough for the most devastating blows, desperate dodges, and cataclysmic spells


Wintermaw is perfect for getting new players started faster than ever with the streamlined rulebook and additional Rivals decks, and is ideal for bringing Warhammer Underworlds veterans up to date for the new season.

—description from the publisher

In Pirate Clash you will have to be ther faster pirate, avoid the sneaky parrot from giving you away and get the three different treasures from the pirate loot before the rest.

Pirate Clash is a game that combines speed with observation. You must be the first to get the treasure, but if you make a mistake, the crew will punish you.

Each player has a stack of cards and reveals one per turn. When a character and loot match occurs, the first person to grab the golden barrel in the center of the table will win the indicated treasure.

But be careful, if the character already has the loot he was looking for or the sneaky parrot is nearby, we will not be able to get the loot.

boardgame: Tainted Grail: Kings of Ruin – Lost Chapters
description:
Discover two distinct adventures outside of the central Tainted Grail: Kings of Ruin story campaign in the "Lost Chapters" series, specifically designed for 1-4 players. Each adventure, "Knight’s Wager" and "Quest for Igraine’s Tomb" offers a unique narrative that unfolds over 2-4 hours of gameplay with multiple paths and endings to explore.
"Knight’s Wager" is based on the legend of the Green Knight and lets players unravel the mystery behind his strange appearance in a Lothian border keep.
"Quest for Igraine’s Tomb" takes players to the tomb of Arthur's mother and lets them discover previously unknown lore related to the Royal Family and the Brotherhood of the Kingseekers.

Both chapters adhere to the established Tainted Grail: Kings of Ruin game rules and feature fairly difficult encounters. These adventures are not recommended for players new to the Tainted Grail series due to their complexity and challenge level. Before beginning either chapter, ensure any ongoing campaigns are carefully saved, noting all gained Advanced cards. Return all components used in the ongoing campaign to the box, as both Lost Chapters may require some of these elements.

Embark on these standalone adventures and experience the rich, dark world of Tainted Grail with new challenges and decisions that will test even seasoned adventurers.

Note:  These two adventures were included as Stretch Goals in the Gamefound crowdfunding campaign for Kings of Ruin.

boardgame: Rêvelune: Barbe Verte Carte Objectif Bonus
description:
New Objective Card for the game.

Shuffle the card with the other objective cards during set up.

New objective: Stop Green Beard's pirate fleat before she rampages the cities of Celestia.

Card found in Plato Magazine 164.

boardgame: Tainted Grail: Kings of Ruin – Into the Mists
description:
Into the Mists is a solo roguelite adventure in which you tackle increasingly difficult Combat and Diplomacy Encounters, and then finally the Kings of Ruin themselves. It contains random Challenge cards that alter the Encounters and force you to play more strategically.

This expansion of Tainted Grail: Kings of Ruin introduces a new single-player game mode focused only on Encounters and Character advancement. As it contains many spoilers regarding enemies encountered during the game, we recommend you try it after you finish the campaign.

Note: This adventure was included as a Stretch Goals in the Gamefound crowdfunding campaign for Kings of Ruin.

In the realm of Cryptic Nature, there live not only elusive animals but also mysterious plants. In the Flora expansion, you can explore these cryptid plants, bringing their existence to light. However, the task is challenging — obtaining a sample of a cryptid plant requires completing entire quests! Unlock greater reputation than in the base game by simultaneously pursuing quests alongside your search for cryptids. Bringing plants to the sanctuary adds to your exploration and rewards you with a valuable bonus action. 

—description from the publisher

Welcome to the heart of Everlight city. Visit a winding street known to all as Wizard’s Walk. It is full of mysterious shops. Many owned by the Alchemic Masters, each one a treasure trove of magical artifacts and mystical brews. One fateful evening, under the cloak of darkness, a thief known as the Shadow Serpent slithered through the city. With a swift and silent grace, he managed to rob every single alchemy shop on the magical lane. As the shopkeepers woke up they found their stores bereft of their magical wares. With only 20 minutes left until the opening of their shops, the shopkeepers now face the daunting task of restocking their assortment.

Potion Crafter is an enchanting roll and write color game that blends strategy with a touch of magic!
You are the Master of Alchemy, a shopkeeper of one of the most known magic shops in the Everlight city. Rush to prepare the potions all according to the ancient recipes inscribed on your enchanted parchment. Use the basic, yet unique magical ingredients to create three basic liquids. Combine those in your ancient mixer to unlock a palette of new powerful liquids. Try to pour them to the veils in the ideal sequences. The shopkeeper that manages to prepare the best set of potions in the most optimal way will gain the victory!

You will need a dash of luck, and a splash of skill and strategy to complete your potions. Remember, every great Potion Crafter knows that the most potent magic comes from within. Prepare glass alchemical pots and let the magic begin!

—description from the publisher

In this expansion, you will discover the most hidden and isolated places of Cryptic Nature. The new cryptids will be harder to reach because they live on remote islands.
But you will have one new way to travel — by sea.

—description from the publisher

Swedish children game with two games in one. Bokstavsgömme is about placing tiles with letters on a board to get a card.First to get 8 card and one with at least one of each character wins. Ordstafetten is about finding tiles to spell a name on a card. First to solve 4 card win. Can be played on different difficulties. Everything is done with characters from Bamse

boardgame: Victory Lane: A Thunder Rolls Card Game
description:
Victory Lane: A Thunder Rolls card game is a fast and fun stock car racing game by Richard Launius. The game uses a card driven system similar to Thunder Rolls in a compact and faster package.

Victory Lane emphasizes fast-paced action, meaningful decisions, and a smaller play area, making it accessible and engaging for both casual and experienced players. ​ Looking for a high-octane racing experience with streamlined rules and dynamic gameplay? Victory Lane is the one for you!

—description from the publisher

Sadly, the Kickstarter campaign limited fulfilment to the US. The project was cancelled on 2026-02-08. Message by the designer:

[...] I had hoped that the thematic strength and quality game play would be something that gamers were seeking, and maybe that would be the case if we had done more advertising, or if it was just published and distributed. This is one of my favorite designs, and a passion project for me and a game that I will always enjoy, but it is just not funding.  Therefore, we are ending the campaign and, at present there is no plan to bring it back to crowd funding. [...]

In Bamse aktivitetsspel you win tiles by doing different moves and sounds. Those can be things like: walk like a gorilla, sneak like a cat or sound like a race car. Now and then Vargen comes out and hides a tile. The first player that manages to get four different tiles wins the game.

How to use the 2024 card (Thwart):
Take one Broken Tool card that is in front of you or another player and place it in front of a player of your choice.

boardgame: Libertalia: Winds of Galecrest – Loot Tile Promo Pack
description: Expand your copy of Libertalia: Winds of Galecrest with this set of 7 new double-sided loot tiles (plus 7 versions of these tiles for solo play)!

Welcome to Nuka World, the latest Regional Ruleset for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare and the most raider’riffic book to ever hit the shelves. From the glittering lights and plastic facades of Nuka World we bring a host of new Units, Weapons, Scenarios, Rules and more to make your Wasteland experience more exciting than ever before. Pledge allegiance to one of the three gangs of Nuka World and engage in a multi-stage war for the park in an all new campaign system and remember that anything you’re strong enough to take, is yours by right!

All the key figureheads of the Disciples, Operators and The Pack are on show here, backed by their deadly entourages in brand new miniatures, alongside some of the more flamboyant personalities that you can spot around the park. Updated rules for Wasteland Warfare as a whole are introduced with Nuka World, streamlining your experience like never before. Combined with new Vault Tec approved Profiles and Force Lists (presented in the most accessible format ever!), Nuka World is your one stop shop for Cola-themed bloodbaths!

As always, the beautifully painted miniatures gallery is accompanied by painting guides, scenarios, and a brand new book style, keeping every turn of the page new and interesting. There’s never been a Wasteland Warfare book quite like this one, the same Warfare you love, but with a brand new flavour!

ElvenTrolls is a trick-taking card game with the stunning illustrations of the Swedish artist John Bauer.

"When you talk about trolls, they are standing outside your door listening." - Swedish proverb.

ELVENTROLLS is a trick-taking card game played in pairs, featuring the stunning illustrations of Swedish artist John Bauer.

The forests of Sweden are restless, as the number of troll attacks has been increasing each night. Due to food shortages caused by the growing elven population, the trolls are being forced out of the forests in search of food, disturbing the peace of nearby villages.

In ELVENTROLLS, players take on the role of Druids hired by the local villagers. Together with their partner, they must restore the natural balance between the Elves and Trolls by guiding them into the great "Silent Forest." There, players will lead the creatures through winding forest paths to their "Clearings," where magical Rune battles will take place. If the Trolls win, they will devour their elven rivals. The Elves, on the other hand, will try to distract the Trolls until dawn, when they turn to stone.
 ELVENTROLLS is a trick-taking card game played in pairs (one pair will play with the troll deck and the other with the elf deck). Each player has a Druid card with a unique ability that, when active, becomes the trump Rune for the round. The player with the highest-numbered card wins the trick, leading the elves and trolls to their "Forest Glade." The player with the lowest number chooses any of the played cards and sends it to any player's "Forest Glade."

Then, it's checked whether any player has 3 or more cards with the same Runes in their "Forest Glade." If they do, those cards are defeated, forming 2 face-down piles (devoured elves and trolls turned to stone). After that, if the total value of trolls in a "Forest Glade" exceeds that of the elves, the elves are defeated and go to the player's devoured elves pile. If it's the opposite, the trolls are defeated and go to the pile of trolls turned to stone.

At the end of the 6th round, the pairs swap decks, and at the end of the 12th round, the pair that has the smallest difference between their piles of devoured elves and trolls turned to stone wins the game. Just be careful not to speak during the game, as any noise might attract them to the wrong "Forest Glade."

boardgame: Mitt första tärningsspel: En tävling i skogen
description:
The animals are ready for a race in the forest. You are invited. Race around the track with your two animals and try to be the first one to bring them home. If you are lucky you land on the special field and get an extra throw.

This colorful game is filled with excitement and train the youngest kids to understand the numbers 1-3, to wait on their turn, and help their observational skill.

Orléans: Big Box — first released as Orléans: Anniversary Box — collects all released materials as of 2025 for Orléans, a game set in the French city of the same name during medieval times in which you must assemble a following of farmers, merchants, knights, monks, etc to gain supremacy through trade, construction and science in medieval France.

In more detail, you will recruit followers and put them to work to make use of their abilities. Farmers and Boatmen supply you with money and goods; Knights expand your scope of actions and secure your mercantile expeditions; Craftsmen build trading stations and tools to facilitate work; Scholars make progress in science; Traders open up new locations for you to use your followers; and last but not least, it cannot hurt to get active in monasteries since with Monks on your side you are much less likely to fall prey to fate.

You will always want to take more actions than possible, and there are many paths to victory. The challenge is to combine all elements as best as possible with regard to your strategy.

Orléans: Anniversary Box included three new Ortskarten — that is, place tiles — and those tiles are included in Orléans: Big Box, in addition to being available separately.
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games

boardgame: Murder Mystery: The Game – The Mad Hatter
description: Investigate 20 locations in the game, examine evidence, interview witnesses and suspects, analyze clues, and much more. When a killer called the Mad Hatter stages a crime scene using imagery from Alice in Wonderland, you will investigate the case and bring the killer to justice. Investigate the murder mystery as a special consultant for the FBI. Challenge your skills as a detective!

Be the first player to win 8 coins

Blue and green cards are shuffled into one deck. Red cards make up a separate challenge deck.

When a green card is flipped, player(s) who fulfill the requirements win a coin (for example players whose last letter of their first name is closest to the letter Z).

When a card from the blue deck is flipped, each player must write down up to six synonyms of the word. The player who wrote the most synonyms in common with the other players wins a coin.

If there is a tie, draw a card from the red challenge deck. The first person to give the correct answer wins the coin.

A Deck-builder/Area Control Game of epic proportions for 1-5 players. Choose your Faction, each commanded by a Classic Monster - Dracula, Frankenstein's Monster, Wolfman, Creature from the Deep, or the Wicked Witch. Buy cards tos build your army and supply them with weapons, vehicles, creatures, and spells to conquer locations and complete missions that will give you powerful abilities, but don't leave your sanctum undefended or your opponents may take advantage. Score points by defeating opposing champions and minions, as well as taking locations and mission cards. The first Monster to 20 points. Wins.

Hide and Seek in the Safari Park from Tactic Games - Seek and find hidden animals in this exciting safari park game!

Are you ready for an adventure in the safari park? In Kurragömma in the safari park, your mission is to look for hidden animals together with your fellow players. The double-sided game board can be put together in different ways before each round, making each game unique and full of challenges.

Your goal is to find the animals shown on the game card and be the first player to reach them to get rewards in the form of animal figures. Be quick and find the right animal before the other players to increase your chances of winning the game.

Hide and seek in the safari park is designed for 2 to 4 players and is recommended for children aged 4 and up. With a playing time of around 15-20 minutes, it is a perfect game to play together with family and friends, especially for younger children who can have fun searching and matching the animals.

It's worth mentioning that Hide and Seek in the Safari Park was named Children's Game of the Year 2020, making it a popular choice among players and a great game to introduce to kids.

Go on an exciting safari and let the fun begin with Hide and Seek in the safari park!

Three long years have elapsed, since the valiant Heroes drove the Demon Generals and their legions from our realm. Yet, peace proved fleeting... The aftermath of turmoil has fractured many Noble houses, each vying to expand their kingdoms, forge new alliances with heroes, and unearth potent magics and ancient scrolls to fortify their ranks. As the leader of your Noble house, the weight of proving your family's conquests as legendary, falls squarely upon your shoulders.

Each player assumes the role as the head of their noble house, each vying to expand their kingdoms, forge new alliances, and unearth potent magics and ancient scrolls to fortify their ranks.

Gameplay:


     Draw cards
     Roll resource dice
     Make Trades
     Strategize 
     Pay resources to play different card types
     Build your kingdom with a variety of cards such as Spells, 


Scrolls, Terrains, Buildings and Heroes.

—description from the designer

Greek mythology tells of a hero named Odysseus who used wax earplugs and a rope to survive hearing the song of the sirens without being drowned. As you sail closer to the sirens' waters with your friends, you hear singing coming from everywhere... Will you collect the most attractive singing voices without falling into temptation?

In The Temptation of Siren, players push their luck to be the first to build sets. On each turn, players may turn over as many Singing Voice cards as they like from the deck and add them to a lineup. Each card contains two sections of color, and a player's turn ends if a fourth matching section of color appears in the lineup. A player may stop at any time and take as many cards as they like from the lineup, as long as they do not have more than three matching sections of color in their area.

Players may trade in their cards for one of the three visible Singing Voice Points cards after or instead of drawing, but not before. The Singing Voice Points cards require different combinations and numbers of color sections, with more challenging combinations being worth more points. The first player to collect 15 points worth of Singing Voice Points cards wins.

—user summary (translated and adapted from the rules and publisher's description)

Gemma is a land of bright hope, where joyful hearts become gems. The joy of happiness is a white gem. The joy of peace is a blue gem. The joy of wisdom is a black gem. Emotional joy is a red gem. The kingdom brought joy to the people, and the people donated gems to the kingdom, and together they developed. Tour the royal capital, collect jewels of joy, and expand your kingdom with Gemma carte, the map to jewels. The person who contributes the most to the kingdom's prosperity will be the next heir to the throne.

Gemma karte is a game of worker placement and resource management with cute components and simple rules. Earn gems by moving pieces to locations, use the collected gems to add new locations or present them to the castle. Use your character's unique abilities to be the first to earn 5 honor points and win the game!

Rummy-style game designed by David Parlett where players are trying to collect cards which will form a high-scoring 3x3 grid of cards. In contrast to other Rummy games, when a player knocks they instead will lay out a grid and score for 3-card combinations formed within the grid.

The name "Brummy" comes from the demonym for the city of Birmingham, England.

How are your Hammer Hands? Lemme see you Floss. No idea what that means? Great! Move Like Me is a group game sure to get everyone moving and laughing.

It’s like the telephone game, but with movement, and it can be even more fun when it goes wrong!

—description from the publisher

This is a solitaire game where you step into the mind of Emperor Napoleon Bonaparte on 18 June, 1815 and take on his greatest challenge. Can you defeat the combined armies of Wellington and Blücher near the small town of Waterloo, or will you be defeated and deposed from the throne of France?

Your objective, as Napoleon, is not only to crush Wellington's hodgepodge Allied forces, but you must also retain enough of your army – especially the Guard – for the battles to come. For if Napoleon won at Waterloo, he would still have to face large Russian and Austrian armies.

Key to the game is the revealing of the Allied forces. When Napoleon arranged his forces at Waterloo most of the Allied forces were hidden behind tall crops, hedges, ridges and other terrain features. So it will be with you - as you make contact with the enemy, their forces will start to be revealed. Perhaps your attack will hit weak troops, or maybe you'll end up facing the British Guard and their fearsome heavy cavalry! Every game will be different and your decisions will determine victory or defeat. The Allies do not just sit back either: They will reinforce, launch cavalry charges and/or infantry attacks and of course the Prussians are on their way…

The destiny of France is in your hands.

Features
Napoleon at Waterloo is an area movement game of the Battle of Waterloo. Units are generally brigades, and there are over 100 of them as the game includes not just the forces that actually fought at Waterloo but also:

     The entire French Armée du Nord.
     The entire Prussian I, II and IV Corps.
     The Allied forces (Dutch and British Divisions) in reserve at Hal.


A great many options and scenarios are included for variety, such as:

     Uncertain Prussian arrival.
     An early start.
     Reaction of the Allied forces at Hal.
     Blocking the Prussians in the forests.
     Grouchy.
     Different difficulty settings.


Sequence of Play

     Bombardment Phase.
     Roll Command Dice Phase.
     Expend Command Dice Phase.
     Enemy Reaction Phase.
     Check for Victory/Defeat Phase.


—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

boardgame: Rolling Realms: Dice Throne Promo Pack
description:
Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards, inspired by Dice Throne.

To play this realm you use dice to fill squares, matching the conditions on the rows. When filling a row, you gain a reward. Can you fill the most difficult rows and gain the biggest rewards?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Rolling Realms: Terraforming Mars Promo Pack
description:
Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards, inspired by Terraforming Mars.

To play this realm you will use your dice to mark outlined cards. Cards are outlined by fulfilling conditions, based on the number of resources you gain. Play the other realms smart to maximize the number of outlined cards and gain the best rewards in this realm.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Rolling Realms: Eminent Domain Promo Pack
description:
Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards, inspired by Eminent Domain.

To play this realm you must mark boxes in columns matching your dice, to gain the benefits from those boxes. Can you reach the highest boxes with the double stars?

—description from the publisher

Navigate wisely across the uncharted lands. Choose your path and find the lost treasures!

Choose your character and embark on a solo expedition or compete against the other treasure hunters. Choose one of the uncharted locations to explore. Survey your maps and plan your route. Defeat monsters or find a way around. Collect treasures and artifacts to unlock one of the endings for your character!

—description from the designer

Master Yacht is played with one common roll for all players. Each player has his own set of five differently colored dice and a holder. Players are awarded a bonus for scoring early in the round.

Game uses dice of five different colors and a score pad. The score pad is used to keep track of the various combinations in which the five dice may fall and assign a value to a particular combination. The goal is to score the highest number of points by filling in category boxes with the highest point value possible (similar to yahtzee).

One player rolls the five larger common dice. The results are used by all players at the same time. There are 3 common rolls per turn. Roll the dice. Players choose which dice from the common roll will be used to build scores. Players must use the same color die and match the number to the common die of the same color. Any chosen dice are added to the player's holder. This process is completed 3 times. Between rolls, players may remove any desired dice from the holder for use in subsequent rolls. Dice already in the holder may not be replaced with a different match on the same turn as the common dice are rolled. 
Once all categories have been completed, the game ends and scores are calculated.

This is a game in which children write an answer to a made up scenario - for example "A bodybuilder who is like a time traveler". The parents read these answers and try to guess what the original prompt was.

A dry erase party game of cooperation, deduction, and ridiculous situations.

—user summary

「〇〇みたいな〇〇」というお題に対して、それが実際あったらどんな風になるのか、子プレイヤーたちが回答を答えます。 親プレイヤーは子プレイヤーの回答だけを見て、そのお題が何かを当てるゲームです。

—description from the publisher

In Bahamut Dispute, engage in a wizard battle for the fate of your kingdom.

To settle your duel, both you and your opponent race to summon Baleful Bahamut, a legendary dragon. Successfully summoning him will lead to an immediate victory on the following turn, but doing so won't be simple. Both players have access to a variety of spells and actions, drawing one of the 16 total cards and playing up to two of them on their turn. Cards can have simple effects like retrieving a card from the discard pile or stabbing your opponent with a flying knife, to more intense ones like boosting the number of cards playable that turn or summoning a goblin that instantly counters your opponent's attempts to do damage. Things are complicated further by the existence of Necro-nope-icons, which act as an instant nullifier to a used card, sending it straight to the discard pile.

In order to win the duel, players must conserve their Necro-nope-icons and utilize spells and actions in clever combinations to force their opponent to waste theirs. When the time is right, bring forth Baleful Bahamut!

All players write an answer based on a common theme. Afterwards, all answers are ranked based on the level of emotion they illicit amongst the players. 
Try to come up with an answer that will cause the biggest stir of emotions within other players!

NGワードを言わないように、それぞれ割り当てられた配役を演じる即興劇ゲームです。

リモートでも遊べるルールが含まれており、遠くの人とも気軽に遊ぶことができます。

description: Family friendly escape game in a medieval setting. The story driven game includes solving puzzles as well as some deductive skills and offers a scoring at the end based in the age of the group and the used hints.

Capture the treasure before the captain catches you! A pirate captain has collected quite a treasure, and these pesky monkeys want a piece of it! Move around the game board, make your way to the captain´s lair and steal as many coins as you can. Just be careful because the captain does not want to share!

Players roll dice to either move their own monkey or move the captain. If you manage to get into the captains lair you can steal gold, but must get out before the captain catches you. First player to return with 3 gold coins wins the game.

Steel Front: Sherman 1944 is a solitaire wargame that puts you in control of a Sherman tank during the Battle of France in 1944. As the tank crew, you'll face off against a game-controlled German side.

Each mission is designed to be replayed, with changing weather conditions, different enemy setups, and dynamic objectives that ensure no two games are the same.

Steel Front: Sherman 1944 is perfect for those who enjoy solo wargames with a strong emphasis on historical accuracy and tactical depth.

Oarful Seas is a fast-play ancient naval ruleset for wargaming fleet actions of 20+ ships per player. Players command multiple squadrons of oared vessels as they ram, shear, board and shoot missiles in an attempt to sink or capture enemy ships.

The ruleset is designed for 1/1200 scale miniatures using a 6x4 table. A typical game of Oarful Seas will need approximately 20-30 ships per player. Apart from ships, players need a measuring tape in inches, at least two 6-sided dice (though a few more would be useful), and some way of marking slowed, immobilized and wrecked ships.

—description from the publisher

Wheel to Wheel is a modern formula racing board game for car Racing fans and Families to enjoy the thrill of a race weekend. It simulates the excitement of real life racing. You can enjoy the excitement of risky overtakes, crashes, crucial pit stops, strategies and much more. The colorful design of the hexagonal board incorporates famous curves from racetracks around the world. The game includes premium durable metal tokens based on Enzo, our Wheel to Wheel character, and embedded wooden dice for three different engine modes. Every player has a Control Panel for setting their skills, completed laps, tire options and energy deployment. By using the energy recovery system you can optimize your speed on the track and overtake in crucial moments.

The dedicated free app makes the gameplay more exciting and helps to follow the progression of the game. It contains a calculator too for easily calculating the race results, and gives a clear overview of the rules with its built in rulebook.

No plastics used. All accessories are manufactured with premium quality made of metal or recycled wood.

—description from the designer

Maxonaut is a bluffing card game. Each player in turn plays a combination of two numbered cards face down, announcing a value. The next player must either call the previous player's bluff, or play two cards and announce a higher value. The first player to make five incorrect calls loses the game.
Optionally, some special power power cards can be added to the deck.

boardgame: Crime & Dine: Das Krimi-Dinner-Set – Friesenmord auf Sylt
description:
Invite your guests to an exciting dinner evening in the Frisian restaurant “Strandräuber”. But be warned: murder is on the menu today! As the players, you are the main suspects in a mysterious death: Has an old treasure hunter from Sylt really found what he was looking for? Onno Reik may have found the pirate treasure of the legendary Captain Magnus Rotbart Ahmout. He has invited people to his nephew's restaurant to announce something important to friends, acquaintances and adversaries. But before this can happen, Onno is found murdered. Was it about the treasure? Were conflicts from days gone by his undoing? Or has he not found any treasure at all, but uncovered a well-kept secret that should have remained hidden?

—description from the publisher

Experience exciting adventures with your favorite superheroes from the Marvel universe, fight legendary opponents and test your knowledge of one of the most successful film franchises of all time. Are you a hardcore fan or should you watch the Marvel films again?
Use the placement test to find out which superhero is most like you! Test your knowledge with over 250 exciting questions and prove that you are a true Marvel fan. Embark on a puzzle journey through the Marvel universes alone or together with friends. The appropriately designed game templates for the joint quiz are easy to download via QR code.

—description from the publisher

The disemboweled body of a German who worked for an Austrian company is floating in a mountain lake near the German border. He seemed to have made a habit of spending almost every other weekend at the lake to take a break from the big city. But perhaps this was not the only reason for his stay at the lake ...

Ellie Stocker and Gedeon Winter quickly take on the case. But the first parallels to the Krampus case soon emerge and the investigators are faced with a mystery: Why was the victim floating in the lake? What was the motive? Who is the killer? And above all - will he strike again?

boardgame: Die Escape-Box für Minecraft-Fans: Flucht aus dem Dungeon

You leave your village to travel the world in search of glory and adventure. But no sooner have you ventured a few steps into a dungeon while exploring than the entrance suddenly closes behind you. You are trapped! The guardian of the dungeon tells you that the powerful Arch-Illager is behind it. He wants to use his magic to open a portal of darkness and unleash an army of monsters on the world. You must prevent this! But you don't have much time. The portal will be open in 45 minutes and the monsters can escape unhindered! Will you manage to avert the threat and free yourselves from the dungeon?

—description from the publisher

Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of Alea Aquarius and accompany the Alpha Cru on their exciting adventures! Test your fan knowledge with 128 tricky questions about the popular novel series and the protection of the oceans. Discover fantastic facts about the magical merpeople, Lennlea and her friends. boardgame: Fish you were here: Das witzige Reaktionsspiel

Most of the time they meet other animals and respond with “blubb”, but when they meet one of their own kind, they greet each other enthusiastically with their own words and gestures! “Bling” is what the frogfish shout when they swim past each other, blinking happily. But what do the sharks say to each other again? Greet each other correctly and get rid of your cards as quickly as possible. The fishing hooks provide additional action, because everyone wants to grab the tasty worm - but not the dangerous electric eel!

boardgame: Nenne drei: schon vorbei! – für Harry Potter-Fans!

So you know your way around the wizarding world. But can you also name three matching terms for a category in just nine seconds, such as three ghosts, rooms in the castle or magic potions? Whoever answers correctly gets the card and whoever has the most cards at the end wins the game.

boardgame: Nenne drei: schon vorbei! – für New Adult-Fans!

Whether it's popular tropes, bad boys or cities in which New Adult books are set - of course you know your way around. But can you name three terms in just nine seconds? That's the only way to win this fast-paced, romantic game and become the winner of hearts.

Whoever answers correctly gets the card and whoever has the most cards at the end wins the game. The rules are very simple and the fun can begin immediately. The categories are a colorful mix and range from pop culture and everyday knowledge to flora and fauna - there's something for every teenager!

The exciting question game is now available for all teenagers - whether in pairs or in large groups - everyone can play! Would you rather have unlimited battery life or endless mobile data for your cell phone? Would you rather be able to breathe underwater or fly? How do you decide? The practical card box in a handy take-away format is ideal for on the go, at home or as a fun party game.

Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of magic! Get ready to brew Felix Felicis, Polyjuice Potion and the Potion to Boost. To do this, throw the number cards into the matching potion cauldrons one after the other. Flip-Flop-Monster is a fun memo game with an exciting twist. Who will win the most monsters? Go in search of the complete groups of monsters - the number on the tiles tells you how big the group is. Turn the tiles over and discover the monsters on the backs. The aim is to collect monsters from a group. The number on the tiles indicates how many identical pictures make up a complete group. The aim is to collect as many tiles as possible and place them in front of you. But even these tiles are not safe at first, as other players can still steal them. Only the player with the most tiles in front of them at the end of the game wins.

BACTERIUM!  a thrilling 2-player P&P card game where you take control of powerful bacteria, vying to shape the very essence of life itself!

Your planet is just born, and you have to evolve the bacteria under your control. Take part in the beginning of the life formation.

Harness the power of evolution as you strategically play through an array of bacteria challenges, mutations, and unexpected twists. Will you pave the way for your bacterial brethren to flourish, or will your opponent outmaneuver you, leaving your planet barren and desolate?

With easy-to-learn mechanics and endless strategic depth, Bacterium! promises thrilling gameplay for 10+ age players. Are you ready to embark on the ultimate microbial journey and claim victory as the architect of life itself? The fate of your planet awaits your command!

description:

In ティルナノグを探して (Searching for Tír na nÓg), magical material cards have three attributes: sky, sea, and earth. Each attribute can be one of three materials. You create magic using a set of three cards from your hand, with different combinations of matching attributes and materials scoring different points. Plus, when you create magic with your chosen attribute, you receive a nice bonus. Make good use of the different attributes of magic and collect rainbow fragments!
artists: Sasari Hinoe (ササリ ヒノエ)

description:
Chatons & Dragons is a comic combined with a game, the first title in a series subtitled "The comic in which you are the tiny hero". You embody a character in a immersive story in which your choices guide your progress. Gameplay consists in following the comic's panels and making choices about where to go and what to do.

Stories are specifically designed for children with simplified adventures compared to the collection of "comics in which you are the hero".

In this story, young readers will assist Mo, the King's youngest kitten as he hunts for a dragon named Choukra and proves his bravery! Sneak through the woods, into dark caves, past the King’s guard while solving puzzles as you go in search of adventure and the Choukra along with Mo! Help Mo to overcome his fears as he learns the truth about the dreaded Choukra, proving to everyone just how brave he is.

Players are astronauts who must cross the Earth's atmosphere (yellow fields) and two galaxies (blue and white fields) to reach the ATA space base.
If the player lands on a field with black dots indicating cosmic acceleration, he moves forward by a number of halves equal to the number of dots drawn. If the player lands on a field with blue dots indicating space delay, he moves backward by a number of halves equal to the number of dots drawn. If a player stands on a field with a picture, he reads from the instructions the adventure marked with the appropriate number on the field.
The player who reaches the ATA base first wins.
The game comes with two pawns, but there is nothing stopping more people from playing it.

F1 Roll & Race is a game for F1 racing fans, in roll & write format. 
Move around each of the circuits taking advantage of the asymmetric abilities of each car. Upgrade your car, suffer and repair breakdowns, collect fuel before your rivals and use it to increase your speed every turn. 
You can play each track independently or play them all as a championship, moving up or down the rankings according to the results of each game.

—description from the designer

In this competitive deduction set collection card game, players try to complete sets of cards to be crowned Great Oracle.

At the beginning of the game, each player gets 5 cards, 3 Powers, 1 Goal and 1 Shard.

The cards have three characteristics:

     One of three symbols
     One of three number
     One of three color


The back of each card shows one of these characteristics visible to your opponents.

Completing a set of 3 cards with the characteristic specified by a Goal gets you 1 Shards, a set of 4 gives 2 Shards, a set of 5 grants you 3 Shards.
The first to gather 6 Shards wins the game.

On their turn, player may perform up to 4 actions in these order:

     Reveal and score a set and/or deduce a Goal from an opponent (facultative action)
     Draw a new Goal if they have none
     Activate one of their Power (the same Power can't be activated two rounds in a row)
     Switch a card with one in the middle of the table

SUBASTA is a game about auctions where a group of very rich people will get very weird and random items in crazy auctions.

The players will participate in different fast paced auctions with different bidding mechanics where they will get non-conventional items like a vegan zombie or a poop in a stick.

During the game, there's a random chance of getting income depending on the amount of items each players have (the more items, the better), and there are also some random events that will disrupt the game economy in crazy ways.

The first player to get 3 cards of the same color group or 3 cards of the same number group wins the game.

—description from the designer

The Totem Game is based on the totem pole mythology and all of the different cultural and mythological components that go along with it. Native American, Canadian, Norse and Pacific Islanders have used totem poles as part of their storytelling and belief system

Spirit animals, cryptids, or mythological creatures will come to your aid in this game to help you obtain your objectives or stop other players from attaining theirs. The average length of each game is about 5 minutes to 10 minutes and the fast pace of the game helps. The average teaching time of this game is a few minutes to you can be up and running and having a good time quickly.

Card powers can be augmented by using the combination powers listed on them, giving a second and deeper level of strategy.   You can also use different deck building setups that will enhance or complicate gameplay.

—description from the designer
An expansion for Nova Aetas Renaissance. This expansion add a side campaign consisting of 3 missions. It also contains 2 new Heroes, 2 new hunt missions, 6 new enemy types and new Equipment.

SOLKRIG: Wojna o Układ Słoneczny ("SOLKRIG - War for the Solar System") is a strategic area control board game set in a cosmic theme, centered around a brutal war for dominance, power, and resources unfolding in the distant future within the Solar System. Players score points by developing upgrades, researching technologies, achieving milestones, dominating specific areas, and fighting or destroying opponents' structures. They play cards, gather resources, assemble and upgrade military units, and build various structures — all to overpower their enemies and seize control of our native star system!

The winner is the player who, at the end of the game, has accumulated the most Victory Points (VP). The game lasts for 6 rounds or until players achieve a specific number of milestones (dependent on the number of players).

—description from the designer

description:
Tess is a game of tactical tiling. Players compete and co-operate(sometimes inadvertently) to create colourful patterns.

Each player starts with a set of tiles of different colours and shapes. And the game proceeds with each player placing a tile onto the board adding to the pattern. There are two competing objectives, one to maximise the number of colours the tile is in contact with, and the other is to complete patterns present on cards they have drawn from a pile.

The resulting pattern every time is unique like a snowflake.

—description from the designer

Toc Chocottes is a game of memory and risk taking game.
Each card is a nightmare that players must get rid of.

At the beginning of each round, each player know 2 of their 4 facedown cards.

When any card is discarded, every player can get rid of the matching cards he/she remembers.

This game is based on traditional 'dutch/tamalou" game.

description:
This box was designed to delight Colt Express fans! It brings original content and exclusive, high-quality game elements, such as wooden screen-printed pawns and tokens, as well as two new bandits to play with even more players.

It's the perfect box to give (or to treat yourself to) for all Colt Express fans!

But what's in this box?

     THE CIRCUS CAR — Slide up and down the giraffe's neck to change floors, or search the clown's chests.
     THE HANDCAR — Hide underneath the train and pop up wherever you like, or send your opponents flying to the roof of the train.

     SPECIAL PUNCH CARDS — The bandit targeted by a special Punch card is not moved to an adjacent train car, but changes floors instead.


—description from the publisher

Avoid the Cats! is a family trick taking/avoidance game where players play as rats trying to avoid the cats, who will chase players that goes for specific cheese. Will you be able to score points avoiding them? Or, even better, will you face them all for even more of points?

Using some simplified mechanics from Cheez-Tricks, players play trick-taking hands, following usual trick-taking rules (must follow, trump, etc). In each round, though, some cats should be avoided. For example, the player should not get the Parmesan 7.

Points are awarded according to cats avoided. After three rounds, the player with the most points is the winner.

—description from the designer

TTMC: Tu te mets combien? BTP edition is a unique collaboration between the creators of TTMC and the collaborators of NGE.

Whether you're a master of reinforced concrete or barely know the difference between a Molly pin and a knock-in pin, TTMC: Edition BTP Edition offers a construction gaming experience you never imagined!

With improbable questions as well as certain answers, TTMC: Tu te mets combien? is here for you to become the construction ace.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Sock Pile is a simultaneous-play, sock-scoring card game of chaotic laundry collection. Each player controls a team of quirky Sock Monsters, battling over piles of mismatched socks across shifting locations. With identical decks, players secretly assign monsters to three locations each round — hoping to outwit opponents with clever abilities, timing, and a dynamic Laundry Line tiebreaker.

Each game plays over four fast-paced rounds, with every turn unfolding in three phases: Planning, Rush, and Cleanup. Location effects, sock card values, and objective bonuses constantly mix up the tactics. Players collect, pair, and score sock cards based on matching types and values, with extra points for fulfilling hidden objectives. The rotating Laundry Line — a unique sock-type priority track — breaks ties and keeps strategies fresh.

After 4 rounds, score your socks by making pairs and multiplying their values together, then claim objectives. Whoever has the best sock pile wins!

With fast setup, and simultaneous turns, Sock Pile offers quick, satisfying decisions in a small, handcrafted package—perfect as a thematic filler with surprising depth.

—description from the designer

boardgame: The Walking Dead: Surrounded – Under Siege
description:
The more ground you cover, the more danger you find. The arrival of hard-eyed mercenaries promises a breakthrough against the surrounding threats, but only if you can keep everyone together long enough to make your escape.

6-card expansion for The Walking Dead: Surrounded, that adds Mercenaries, explosives and a new Swap ability.

Game deck consists of 52 cards displaying attack and defensive boxing maneuvers. To begin, every player starts with six cards that are dealt face down. The rest of the cards are placed in a Draw Pile face down. 
Roll a six-die die to determine start.
Player health is determined by tallied damage and scored on the six-sided die, beginning with six reducing by the damage taken each move. 
Each round will be in two phases alternating between each player. 
First Move: Player One shows an attack card. Player Two shows Defense Card. Tally Damage. 
Next Move: Player Two shows an attack card. Player One shows a Defense Card. Tally Damage.
Special Cards: May be played in addition to move to negate an attack or defense after either player has acted. 
Draw replacement cards to maintain a six-card hand. 
Play will continue until a player reaches zero when they are considered “Knocked Out.”

A horde of monsters appeared in a far-off kingdom. You lead a motley crew of adventures who will fight alongside other human knights, elven archers, and beastly warriors. However, only the one who deals the final blow to the monster will take home the monster's head as an achievement. Who among you shall achieve the most feats?

In Todome Knights, players have a hand of numbered Knights, Archers, and Beasts. A monster card with its own special abilities is revealed, and players each select a warrior card and simultaneously reveal them. The player who plays the lowest number attacks first, with the number causing that much damage to the demon. If players reveal equal numbers, they are resolved in the order of blue Knight, then yellow Archer, then red Beast (this order matches the color order of a Japanese traffic light). But be careful! Monsters have hidden strengths, making it difficult to predict which attack will claim victory! Sometimes you may even be defeated by the demons.

The player who administers the finishing blow to the monster takes that card as a trophy, which is worth 1 point. If you defeat a monster by hitting its weak point, the trophy is worth 2 points.  After six monsters, the player with the most points wins.

user summary (adapted and translated from the publisher's description)

boardgame: AT-43 Hero Box: Nina Zero & Babylon Zero
description: AT-43 Therian Hero expansion;  Nina Zero is an officer and a hero for the Therian army. She comes on foot and aboard her combat strider Babylon Zero. As a soldier, Nina Zero can become the officer of any bane goliath unit. Aboard her armored fighting vehicle, she is a unit of her own. Overseer Nina Zero has her own routine, "Zero Fire," which allows her to benefit from sniper rule even when she moves. Her armored fighting vehicle is equipped with a pair of medium nucleus cannons 2.0, an tweaked version with increased rate of fire! On top of that, this exceptional overseer can recruit a Red Blok unit into her company.

boardgame: AT-43 Unit Box: Therian  Wrath Golgoth
description:
The Wraith assault golgoth is a semi-autonomous combat system based on a medium assault frame. It combines solidity and multiple core system patterns to guarantee maximum survival span. Designed to be an extremely mobile command unit, the assault golgoth was designed to become above all else the overseers’ favorite vehicle on the battlefield. The dreaded medium sonic cannon is ideal against soldiers and the medium nucleus cannon works marvels against armored vehicles. This variety of equipment is the Wraith’s best asset. It guarantees the overseer will never experience any boredom during a battle.

—description form the publisher

This expansion includes new maps and new cars to expand the F1 Roll & Race experience. You can now play the new maps individually or expand the championships by combining all the circuits.

—description from the publisher

Renters: Parking extends the experience of the Renters base game. With a new game sheet representing the underground car parks of our building, and new cards where the renters want to find a place for their vehicles, we raise the level of the game, now with a single roll we have more combinations to contemplate.

With this expansion we increase the number of players to 20.

—description from the publisher

Disguised as a detective, I come across another phantom thief at the place I robbed. That phantom thief was also disguised as a detective. A large amount of treasure has been stolen, and if things continue like this, I will inevitably become suspicious…

Who Done Trick is a trick-taking game where you need to deduce from the tricks, match the alibi, and uncover the phantom thief who left behind evidence.

boardgame: TAKEトリックの翁 (TAKE Trick Old Man)
description:
A long time ago, there were many old bamboo cutters, who mixed with the fields and mountains to harvest bamboo.As a result, bamboo resources across the country were depleted! ! Let's aim for a high score by getting the right amount of bamboo, including substitute bamboo, in harmony with other old men. May follow trick TAKE where the intentions of the old men intersect! The game is set in a dystopia where the nation's bamboo resources have been depleted and old bamboo cutters monitor each other's cutting amounts. In recent years, there have been reports of a mysterious phenomenon in which certain nodes of bamboo glow, and there are growing calls for more careful use.

In this trick-taking game each player is one of the many bamboo cutter men.that go into the fields and mountains and collect bamboo with other old men through trick-taking.

Turn based game, the goal is to accumulate stoner points by smoking material cards with tool cards.

Earn action coins, and play action cards to mess around with other players and for your personal benefit.

Out-of-turn cards (e.g Short memory, drug test) to interfere with other player moves.

The player who reaches 20 stoner points win the game.

—description from the designer

License to Laugh is a party game that hinges on your ability to be creative in an attempt to make the other players laugh, or merely please the judge.

A round begins with the judge drawing three letter cards at random. Once all of the players have seen the letters the timer is flipped and they have one minute to write a phrase. The phrase they come up with has to begin with the three letters drawn in the order they are shown on the plate, articles (a, an, the) prepositions (in, on, with, of) or conjunctions (and, but, or) can be added to the phrase to get your thoughts across better. Other then these exceptions, players aren't allowed to add additional words. It is up to the group to determine how vulgar or family friendly you will play. Once time is up, the judge reads the entries aloud and chooses a winner. The criteria for picking a winner is up to the judge, players can feel free to plead their case. Each letter card has a score associated with it and points are awarded according to how many are shown on the plate for that round. The letter cards are set aside and the role of judge moves to the next player. The game ends when a player reaches the finish on the board.

Like a lot of party games, the goal of License to Laugh is for everyone to have a good time, a laugh, and maybe stimulate conversation. Unlike other popular party games, License to Laugh puts the creativity completely in the players hands, no prewritten responses here! This ensures each game is unique to whichever group you have assembled.

boardgame: Discipline 〜ジェレミア魔法学校の崩壊〜
description:
The story of Discipline: The Fall of Jeremiah School of Magic begins when the school appoints a new president. With the students you train over the next three years, you must overcome the biggest crisis since the school's founding.

This expansion to Discipline: 3 Years at Jeremiah School of Magic includes 4 new students with unique abilities to add to your classes, and each teacher may now designate one student as their disciple. Instead of the graduation exam from the base game, the game now ends with everyone working together to survive four escalating trials and save the school from complete disaster.

The expansion also includes a scenario book depicting events for each class leading up to the final trial and its aftermath. This book was designed with solo play in mind, but it may also be used with more players. With the scenario book, you'll experience a stronger sense of the world of Jeremiah Magic of School.

Parcel Panic – Where’s Our Stuff?
A Lost Cargo Deduction Game

A misguided courier has mischievously misdirected your packages to storage lockers in myriad countries around the world.  Parcel Panic is a cooperative deduction game where everyone, but you, knows your parcel’s location and contents!

Each player has three secret cards they cannot see but must decode. Players simultaneously ask any of 80 predefined questions to narrow down the clues and eliminate incorrect guesses and assumptions.

Decipher each mystery while cooperatively working together to stop the courier from completing his devious trip around the world.

Both Cooperative & Competitive Modes!

Bonus: Solo Mode via online web app.

—description from the publisher
family: Theme: Mail / Stamps / The Post Office

description:
Each player has four pawns. Players take turns rolling the dice and moving their pieces by the number rolled. They have to get them to the base. Whoever does it first wins. However, there is a large UFO saucer circulating on the track inside, also moved by dice rolls. When it stops next to someone's pawn, it kidnaps it (the pawn returns to the start).

—user summary
publishers: Przedsiębiorstwo Papierniczo Poligraficzne  Prodryn w Będzinie

description:
What Comes to Mind? is a party game where players write down answers to prompts and try to match with as many other players as possible.

Each round, a card is drawn featuring five statements and a picture on the back. Players answer quickly with the first thing that comes to mind associated with each prompt, receiving two points for each prompts. After three rounds, the player who scored the most cumulative points wins.

A spiritual successor to Twisty Little Passages that elevates the experience as a full-blown tabletop game with card management mechanics, a non-linear campaign, meta-play strategy, and an all new setting, characters, and story.'Play as Fenix, a warrior sage, protecting a magitek world from an ancient threat with the help of a sentient AI. Manage power levels and resources on your player board as you navigate mazelike areas on laminated adventure sheets with a dry-erase pen. Seek out resources and power boosts, carefully defeat enemies standing in your way to advance, and plan how to defeat floor bosses to reach the powerful Time Crystals. Strategize when to perform mystical meditative actions to draw and play crucial resource cards from your Focus Deck.

Time Fenix is a solo-only tabletop campaign game blending puzzle-solving and dungeon-crawling in a richly imagined futuristic fantasy world. This is a fully resettable, narrative-driven adventure where every mission is a handcrafted experience designed for discovery and mastery.

With 20 interconnected areas and 59 challenging missions, you’ll manage resources, collect powerful cards and items, unlock shortcuts, and battle sinister manifestations, all while navigating intricate mazes that are tightly woven into the mechanics of deck-building, legacy progression, and adventure-write play. As you explore each area, you’ll uncover clever paths to boost your score, uncover hidden rewards, and earn Time Crystals to permanently upgrade your stats, abilities, and inventory, and advance the story. Every decision shapes your journey.

The game rewards more efficient play and clever meta-gaming strategy and supports adaptive difficulty levels. Learn as you play: Story sections reveal additional game elements, rules, and mechanics as you progress. Seek out hidden bonuses and areas to unlock greater power-ups. By growing your stats and gaining new Focus cards and special abilities, you can replay familiar areas in new ways to complete tougher objectives and unlock additional powers.

—description from the designer

Object: Face off against the timer and your fellow bakers as you roll the dice to complete recipes, earn points, and win!

Each player has a set of four ingredient dice. Starting with the youngest player, start the timer and flip over a recipe card. A solo bake is completed by the current player, a bake-off is played by all, and overbaked ends the current players turn and allows the next player to finish their time before starting their time. Roll your dice to try to match all the dice on the bake card, rerolling any that don't match.

The game ends when all the recipe cards have been used. Players get 1 point for completed solo bake cards, 2 points for completed bake-off cards, and 0 points for overbaked cards. The player with the most points wins.

Release your inner hipster with this fun and un-ironic game. Grow the longest beard by traveling around the board on your fixed-gear bicycle and collecting karma. But not all karma is good karma: avoid the barbershop and those dreaded clippers. Grab your favorite local brew, bring your vintage film camera, and throw on your favorite vinyl while growing the best beard in this game. More than just ironic fun.

This is a roll-and-move game, where you move around the board, and collect beard and karma cards. The game ends when all beard cards are drawn and you win by having the longest beard and being declared the "King of the Hipsters".

Two influencer couples who fight each other, an animal protection activist who offends, conflicts over a cosmetics company whose internal company information is exposed to the outside world, and of all people, a well-loved early retiree becomes the victim of a perfidious crime. Is it a mistake? Is there a threat of more disaster? Can you decipher the connections?

You are forming a special commission to investigate this criminal case. Can you solve the case before there are more victims? With the order you will receive the results of the investigation found so far on the case in an envelope.

It's best to have your special commission consist of 2-7 players to investigate together. The game can also be played solo.

You can be creative and use tools during the investigation. Research on the Internet may also be necessary to track down the perpetrator.

Players take on the roles of apprentice wizards who visit magical caves to obtain dice that generate magical power. When an apprentice wizard acquires dice scattered in a cave, the magical power flowing from the dice changes the number of dice he holds. The overflowing magical power also affects the apprentice magicians watching from nearby. Only one type of dice can be brought back from a cave. Which apprentice magician will obtain the most magic power?

In Nozoku Dice, you must pay attention to the sides of the dice, not just the top! Players are each assigned a color and start with that color's hand of cards and two of that color's dice. The rest of the dice go to the center of the table. Cards are played by taking a matching die of another player's color and placing it on the card. The one who played the card takes both the primary and secondary actions on the card, capable of affecting the two dice they started with or dice they gain throughout the game. When a die is placed on a card, other players may play cards that match the side of the played die that is facing them. This allows them to take the secondary action. Players don't take back up their cards until they completely run out—and receive a bonus—or are unable to take an action when required.

The game ends when all dice of any one color have been removed from the center. Players each choose a number from 1 to 6, and remove all the dice of that color from their acquired dice. Players calculate their magic power by totaling all the remaining dice. The player with the most dice receives a 2-point magic power bonus. The player with the most magic power at the end wins the game. The game also offers solo play.

—user summary (adapted and translated from the rules and publisher's description)
publishers: 金沢小立野ゲームズ（Kanazawa Kodachi Games）

description:
